Access.description: An Access action refers to an observed or deduced interaction between an entity and an object.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.description: The identity that created a characterization of a concept.

properties.name: description
properties.description: A description of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: externalReference
properties.description: Specifies a reference to a resource outside of the UCO.

properties.name: hasFacet
properties.description: Further sets of properties characterizing a concept based on the particular context of the class and of the particular instance of the concept being characterized.

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: objectCreatedTime
properties.description: The time at which a characterization of a concept is created. This time pertains to the time of creating the record object, and is not an intrinsic characteristic of the concept.

properties.name: objectMarking
properties.description: Marking definitions to be applied to a particular concept characterization in its entirety.

properties.name: objectStatus
properties.description: The current state of formality and acceptance for a UCO object.

properties.name: specVersion
properties.description: The version of UCO ontology or subontology specification used to characterize a concept.

properties.name: tag
properties.description: A generic tag/label.

properties.name: actionCount
properties.description: The number of times that the action was performed.

properties.name: actionStatus
properties.description: The current state of the action.

properties.name: endTime
properties.description: The time at which performance of the action ended.

properties.name: environment
properties.description: The environment wherein an action occurs.

properties.name: error
properties.description: A characterization of the differences between the expected and the actual performance of the action.

properties.name: instrument
properties.description: The things used to perform an action.

properties.name: location
properties.description: The locations where an action occurs.

properties.name: object
properties.description: The things that the action is performed on/against.

properties.name: participant
properties.description: The supporting (non-primary) performers of an action.

properties.name: performer
properties.description: The primary performer of an action.

properties.name: result
properties.description: The things resulting from performing an action.

properties.name: startTime
properties.description: The time at which performance of the action began.

properties.name: subaction
properties.description: References to other actions that make up part of a larger more complex action.

Alert.description: An Alert action involves notification to some entity that some condition or event of particular interest has occurred.

AttackPattern.description: An attack pattern is a common approach (set of actions) utilized by a person or organization to carry out malicious activity intended to achieve some particular objective (within a particular context) against a targeted victim.

Beacon.description: An Beacon action is refer to communication between two objects where the performer is an object and the object property is an object or dataTarqet. Beacon is designed to differentiate between actions performed by and onto objects and actions performed by and onto identities.

Breadcrumb.description: A Breadcrumb is a set of objects placed to be at least partially, sequentially interacted by an adversary to ellicit an explicit response, often in the context of lateral movement.

properties.name: hasAttackSurface
properties.description: hasAttackSurface is an object property which describes the UcoObjects which compose the attack surface which is expected to interacted with by an adversary.

properties.name: hasCharacterization
properties.description: hasCharacterization is an object property which describes the UcoObjects which compose a deception object or adversary engagement concept.

properties.name: hasPerceptionCharacterization
properties.description: hasPerceptionCharacterization is an object property which describes the UcoObjects which compose the perception object which an adversary perceives.

properties.name: breadcrumbTargetObject
properties.description: breadcrumbTargetObject specifies the target object or resource which the breadcrumb is luring an adversary to.

BreadcrumbTrail.description: A breadcrumb trail is a sequence of observed breadcrumbs where partial order of observation of breadcrumbs matter.

properties.name: actionCount
properties.description: The number of times that the action was performed.

properties.name: actionStatus
properties.description: The current state of the action.

properties.name: endTime
properties.description: The time at which performance of the action ended.

properties.name: environment
properties.description: The environment wherein an action occurs.

properties.name: error
properties.description: A characterization of the differences between the expected and the actual performance of the action.

properties.name: instrument
properties.description: The things used to perform an action.

properties.name: location
properties.description: The locations where an action occurs.

properties.name: object
properties.description: The things that the action is performed on/against.

properties.name: participant
properties.description: The supporting (non-primary) performers of an action.

properties.name: performer
properties.description: The primary performer of an action.

properties.name: result
properties.description: The things resulting from performing an action.

properties.name: startTime
properties.description: The time at which performance of the action began.

properties.name: subaction
properties.description: References to other actions that make up part of a larger more complex action.

DenialAction.description: A denial action is an action used for and during a deception campaign which restricts or denies an adversary access to some resource.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.description: The identity that created a characterization of a concept.

properties.name: description
properties.description: A description of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: externalReference
properties.description: Specifies a reference to a resource outside of the UCO.

properties.name: hasFacet
properties.description: Further sets of properties characterizing a concept based on the particular context of the class and of the particular instance of the concept being characterized.

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: objectCreatedTime
properties.description: The time at which a characterization of a concept is created. This time pertains to the time of creating the record object, and is not an intrinsic characteristic of the concept.

properties.name: objectMarking
properties.description: Marking definitions to be applied to a particular concept characterization in its entirety.

properties.name: objectStatus
properties.description: The current state of formality and acceptance for a UCO object.

properties.name: specVersion
properties.description: The version of UCO ontology or subontology specification used to characterize a concept.

properties.name: eventAttribute
properties.description: An event attribute specifies an ad-hoc attribute/value for an event.

properties.description: An event context describes the association of actions and objects relating to an event.

properties.description: An event type specifies a classification type for the event.

properties.name: startTime
properties.description: The initial time of a time range.

HoneyObject.description: An domain object that is created to be percieved by an adversary to have high value to pursue in an adversary engagement operation that has no value out of scope of the operation's intended perception.

properties.name: hasAttackSurface
properties.description: hasAttackSurface is an object property which describes the UcoObjects which compose the attack surface which is expected to interacted with by an adversary.

properties.name: hasPerceptionCharacterization
properties.description: hasPerceptionCharacterization is an object property which describes the UcoObjects which compose the perception object which an adversary perceives.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: objectCreatedTime
properties.description: The time at which a characterization of a concept is created. This time pertains to the time of creating the record object, and is not an intrinsic characteristic of the concept.

properties.name: objectMarking
properties.description: Marking definitions to be applied to a particular concept characterization in its entirety.

properties.name: objectStatus
properties.description: The current state of formality and acceptance for a UCO object.

properties.name: specVersion
properties.description: The version of UCO ontology or subontology specification used to characterize a concept.

properties.name: tag
properties.description: A generic tag/label.

properties.name: hasEvent
properties.description: hasEvent specifies an ordered list of associated Events.

Team.description: The conventional reference to group of identities that are associated with some unified identity with a team objective

properties.name: createdBy
properties.description: The identity that created a characterization of a concept.

properties.name: description
properties.description: A description of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: externalReference
properties.description: Specifies a reference to a resource outside of the UCO.

properties.name: hasFacet
properties.description: Further sets of properties characterizing a concept based on the particular context of the class and of the particular instance of the concept being characterized.

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).
